---
title: "learn"
---


::: {.lang-en}
four ways to think about data.

- [measure](measure/index.qmd) — descriptive statistics, distributions, uncertainty
- [compare](compare/index.qmd) — hypothesis testing, group differences, effect sizes
- [explain](explain/index.qmd) — causal inference, epidemiology, regression
- [predict](predict/index.qmd) — machine learning, classification, forecasting
:::

::: {.lang-vi}
*(Phiên bản tiếng Việt sắp ra mắt.)*
:::
